subject: Cycle day 12 monitoring — Thursday
snippet: Danny — Dr. Strand's office moved the CD12 monitoring to Thursday 12:30 pm. I'll drive myself, no need for you to leave
body: Danny — Dr. Strand's office moved the CD12 monitoring to Thursday 12:30 pm. I'll drive myself, no need for you to leave the office. Just wanted you to have it on the calendar in case you were building around the old Tuesday slot. Bloodwork results should be back by end of day. Love you.

subject: Re: Cycle day 12 monitoring — Thursday
snippet: I want to drive you. Trial prep can wait 90 min, and I don't want you doing the Morristown drive alone if it's a rough d
body: I want to drive you. Trial prep can wait 90 min, and I don't want you doing the Morristown drive alone if it's a rough day. I'm blocking 12-2 pm Thursday. Love you back.

subject: Re: Cycle day 12 monitoring — Thursday
snippet: Okay. Thank you. Pick me up at 12 sharp. Bring me a plain bagel from the Bloomfield place.
body: Okay. Thank you. Pick me up at 12 sharp. Bring me a plain bagel from the Bloomfield place.

subject: Second Thursday — Andros
snippet: D — usual, second Thursday, Andros Diner, 12:30 pm. Confirming. Also — I saw Sean posted about the birthday party for Li
body: D — usual, second Thursday, Andros Diner, 12:30 pm. Confirming. Also — I saw Sean posted about the birthday party for Liam, is that the 18th? I'll be up in Clifton anyway that day, tell Sean I'll swing by. Everything ok on your side? Priya doing ok?

subject: Re: Second Thursday — Andros
snippet: Confirmed 12:30 at Andros. Liam's is the 18th, 2 pm, Sean would love to see you. Priya's alright. We're in another cycle
body: Confirmed 12:30 at Andros. Liam's is the 18th, 2 pm, Sean would love to see you. Priya's alright. We're in another cycle, Thursday is monitoring. She's tougher than me on this stuff, honestly. See you Thursday.

subject: Liam's party — Saturday 2 pm
snippet: D — Liam is turning 8, party Saturday 2 pm at the house. Nothing fancy, pizza + Costco cake + bounce house. He specifica
body: D — Liam is turning 8, party Saturday 2 pm at the house. Nothing fancy, pizza + Costco cake + bounce house. He specifically asked for 'Uncle Danny' and 'Aunt Priya' by name so please try to be there. Michelle wants to know if Priya has any food things I should know about.

subject: Re: Liam's party — Saturday 2 pm
snippet: We're in. I'll grab a Costco Lego kit for Liam, budget $60. Priya's a vegetarian which Michelle knows but she also skips
body: We're in. I'll grab a Costco Lego kit for Liam, budget $60. Priya's a vegetarian which Michelle knows but she also skips dairy this cycle — a slice of the veggie pizza is more than enough, don't stress it. Danny Reese will swing by too.

subject: Appointment confirmation — Dr. Ferraro
snippet: This is a reminder that Danny Wells has an appointment with Dr. Angela Ferraro on 2026-08-11 at 3:30 pm at Garden State
body: This is a reminder that Danny Wells has an appointment with Dr. Angela Ferraro on 2026-08-11 at 3:30 pm at Garden State Neurology (33 Plymouth St, Montclair NJ 07042). Please bring your migraine log and any new medications. Reply CONFIRM or call our office to reschedule.

subject: Re: Appointment confirmation — Dr. Ferraro
snippet: CONFIRM. I'll bring the migraine log through end of July. One question — Dr. Ferraro said last visit that if the Topiram
body: CONFIRM. I'll bring the migraine log through end of July. One question — Dr. Ferraro said last visit that if the Topiramate wasn't controlling frequency by this appointment we'd discuss CGRP inhibitors. Just want to flag that in advance so we're prepared to have that conversation.

subject: Sunday
snippet: Danny honey — I know you and Priya usually do the Menons on the third Sunday but your father wants to see you. Dinner he
body: Danny honey — I know you and Priya usually do the Menons on the third Sunday but your father wants to see you. Dinner here Sunday the 12th? Just family, no fuss. I'll do the sausage and peppers you like. Bring Priya.

subject: Re: Sunday
snippet: Ma — yes. Priya and I will be there Sunday the 12th, 5 pm. Tell Dad we can watch the Yankees game after dinner. Bring no
body: Ma — yes. Priya and I will be there Sunday the 12th, 5 pm. Tell Dad we can watch the Yankees game after dinner. Bring nothing, don't argue.

subject: CLE compliance — 2026 reporting cycle
snippet: This is a reminder that your 2026 CLE compliance cycle ends 2026-12-31. Current credits on file: 20 of 24 required (incl
body: This is a reminder that your 2026 CLE compliance cycle ends 2026-12-31. Current credits on file: 20 of 24 required (including 4 of 4 ethics). Please plan to complete 4 additional general credits before the deadline. Failure to comply may result in administrative suspension. Visit the CLE portal to review approved programs.

body: Priya — reminder that Broadleaf Tech open enrollment closes 2026-07-31. As a spouse-covered dependent, Danny Wells will need to confirm continuation of Aetna PPO family coverage. Please forward this notice to spouse if desired. Fertility benefits ($15K lifetime) remain in force for 2027 unless declined.

body: Aetna has approved the prior authorization for IUI cycle #3 at Northern NJ Fertility Center. Approval is valid through 2026-10-15. Member responsibility for this cycle: $450 estimated (post-benefit). Contact member services if you have any questions about coverage.

subject: Portal - severe episode last Tuesday - sumatriptan not cutting it
snippet: Dr. Ferraro - Danny Wells. Had a severe episode Tuesday morning that ran to about 14 hours, dark room the whole time. Took the sumatri
body: Dr. Ferraro - Danny Wells. Had a severe episode Tuesday morning that ran to about 14 hours, dark room the whole time. Took the sumatriptan 50mg at onset per the current script and it barely moved. Priya sat with me. Wanted to flag this for you before the next follow-up because I have been noticing the 50mg is not doing enough on the harder episodes. Not a rescue request, just a heads up so we can talk about it. Migraine log is up to date on my end. Thanks.

subject: RE: Portal - severe episode last Tuesday - sumatriptan not cutting it
snippet: Danny, thank you for the note. Reviewed your log entries and the Tuesday episode. Given the pattern of severe episodes not responding to the 50mg
body: Danny, thank you for the note. Reviewed your log entries and the Tuesday episode. Given the pattern of severe episodes not responding to the 50mg dose, I want to step up your sumatriptan to 100mg PRN for severe episodes only (mild-to-moderate stay at 50mg). New script is 100mg tablets, take one at onset for severe. Do not exceed 200mg in 24 hours and do not use on consecutive days. I have sent the updated prescription to Montclair Pharmacy and left a chart note updating the medication record. Also want to revisit the CGRP inhibitor conversation at your next visit. Please confirm you have received this note. -- Dr. A. Ferraro / Garden State Neurology

subject: RE: Portal - severe episode last Tuesday - sumatriptan not cutting it
snippet: Confirmed. Picked up the 100mg script from Montclair Pharmacy this afternoon. Will keep the 50mg tablets I have on hand for mild-to-moderate.
body: Confirmed. Picked up the 100mg script from Montclair Pharmacy this afternoon. Will keep the 50mg tablets I have on hand for mild-to-moderate. Also happy to talk CGRP at the next follow-up, Priya wants to be in on that conversation if we go there. Thank you.

subject: Prescription ready - Sumatriptan 100mg (Wells, Danny)
snippet: Your prescription is ready for pickup. WELLS, DANNY P - Sumatriptan 100mg tablets, quantity 9, refills 3. Take one tablet by mouth at onset of severe
body: Your prescription is ready for pickup. WELLS, DANNY P - Sumatriptan 100mg tablets, quantity 9, refills 3. Take one tablet by mouth at onset of severe migraine. Do not exceed 200mg per 24 hours. Prescribed by A. Ferraro, MD (Garden State Neurology). This prescription supersedes the prior 50mg sumatriptan on file. Store your remaining 50mg tablets separately.
